station_address: Ground Floor, BR Road Junction, Lal Bahadur Shastri Marg, near Santoshi Mata Mandir, Govardhan Nagar, Mulund West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400080
text:
Avoid this place if possible.
One of the operators requested to take the car in the front which we did and then just left without doing anything and the other one assumed ours was done and started serving the cars that were behind us in the queue and after honking several times to get their attention, the guy who left initially came back and told the other one that ours was pending. Nobody is ever paying attention to the customers and everyone is in their own world.
After clearly telling the operator "tap karo" he still inserted the card.
Had to beg for the bill to finally get it as if they're doing us a big favour.

station_address: Ground Floor, BR Road Junction, Lal Bahadur Shastri Marg, near Santoshi Mata Mandir, Govardhan Nagar, Mulund West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400080
text:
This HPCL-owned retail outlet has failed for over a year to install even a basic shed or canopy. Refueling here is an ordeal—customers are left to suffer under the scorching sun or get drenched in heavy rains. Shockingly, the company shows no concern for its own staff, who work tirelessly in such harsh conditions.

HPCL has repeatedly given excuses, misled customers, and even misinformed the Ministry instead of taking swift, responsible action. A public-sector company of this stature should set standards in service, not showcase neglect.

Over a year, no canopy—HPCL fuels only excuses, not customer care.

text: Not very populated and very good petrol pump.One faces delay in filing petrol when there is change in shift among employees.They take all types of payments like UPI,card,Cash and ewallet.The speciality about this place is  tyre refilling services are available for free.Petrol Station is also open 24 X 7.

station_address: Ground Floor, BR Road Junction, Lal Bahadur Shastri Marg, near Santoshi Mata Mandir, Govardhan Nagar, Mulund West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400080
text: This one of the busiest petrol pump in mulund west always filled with vehicle. You need to wait for long for getting vehicle filled. Always in rust. People dont follow proper queue. You can see people fighting a lot of time for breaking the queue.
